Title: Locked user can access pages via browser navigation
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ | 2. Enter Username: locked_out_user | 3. Enter Password: secret_sauce | 4. Click Login
Expected Result: User sees error: Sorry this user has been locked out. and cannot access the app
Actual Result: User sees error as expected. Lock functions correctly on initial attempt — further path verification needed

Title: Checkout button remains clickable after removing all items from cart
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Log in with standard_user | 2. Add any product to cart | 3. Click cart icon | 4. Click Remove to remove the product | 5. Observe the Checkout button
Expected Result: The Checkout button should be disabled or hidden when the cart is empty
Actual Result: The Checkout button remains clickable even when the cart is empty — allows empty order checkout

Title: Browser back button after logout allows access to protected inventory page
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ | 2. Log in with standard_user | 3. Navigate to Products page | 4. Open sidebar | 5. Click Logout | 6. Confirm you are on Login page | 7. Click browser Back button
Expected Result: User should remain on login page. Authenticated pages (inventory.html) should not be accessible after logout.
Actual Result: User is navigated back to the inventory page. Protected page is accessible without re-authentication.

Title: Product images display incorrectly for problem_user account
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/ | 2. Log in with problem_user / secret_sauce | 3. Navigate to Products page | 4. Observe the product images
Expected Result: All product images should display the correct image matching the product name
Actual Result: All product images show the same incorrect image (dog/animal image) — not actual product images. Affects all 6 product cards.

Title: Product sort selection does not persist after page refresh
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Log in with standard_user | 2. On inventory page select Name (Z to A) from sort dropdown | 3. Verify products are sorted Z to A | 4. Refresh the browser page
Expected Result: Sort preference should persist after page refresh or revert to default (A to Z)
Actual Result: Sort dropdown visually resets to Name (A to Z) after a page refresh

Title: Error message and red input borders not cleared when user begins retyping
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Navigate to login page | 2. Enter invalid credentials and click Login | 3. Observe error message and red field borders | 4. Click inside Username field and start typing
Expected Result: When user starts correcting credentials the error message and red borders should clear automatically
Actual Result: Red borders and error message remain visible until user explicitly clicks the X on the banner even while actively correcting input

Title: No email confirmation sent after successful order completion
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Complete a full checkout on SauceDemo with any product | 2. Reach the order confirmation page | 3. Check for any order confirmation email
Expected Result: In a real e-commerce application a confirmation email should be sent to the user with order details
Actual Result: No email is sent after order completion (expected for demo app — documented as awareness of real-world requirements)

Title: Add to cart button text inconsistency across inventory and detail pages
Steps to Reproduce: 1. Log in with standard_user | 2. On inventory page note the Add to cart button text casing | 3. Navigate to a product detail page | 4. Compare the button text
Expected Result: Add to cart / Add to Cart button should have consistent text casing across all pages
Actual Result: Minor inconsistency in button text casing/styling between inventory list and product detail pages
